case_title: REYNALDO APARICIO VS. R.A.T. OIL INC. CA

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF SEP-24-2013 - CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT TO JAN-03-2014 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506.
